# elizaos/docs Daily Update (May 8, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for May 8, 2026, focused on expanding the DeFi plugin registry documentation to include token safety features. No other code, documentation, or testing changes were recorded for this repository today.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **DeFi Plugin Registry Expansion**
    *   Initiated documentation updates to integrate SafeAgent for enhanced token safety within the DeFi plugin ecosystem. [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#84](https://github.com/elizaos/docs/pull/84): Add SafeAgent (Token Safety) to DeFi plugin registry. This PR is currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
